summary: Write corpus/traditions.toml registry from chunking configs
description:
## Goal

Generate `corpus/traditions.toml` — the registry of traditions and texts derived from the chunking configs. Used downstream by `graph_bootstrap.py` to insert tradition nodes.

## Format

```toml
[[tradition]]
id = "gnosticism"
name = "Gnosticism"
texts = ["gospel-of-thomas", "gospel-of-philip"]

[[tradition]]
id = "hermeticism"
name = "Hermeticism"
texts = ["corpus-hermeticum"]
```

## Procedure

Either author by hand from the chunking configs, or build a small helper that scans `chunking/` and emits the file. If automated, the output should be committed to the repo.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Every tradition with at least one chunked text appears once
- Every text in `chunking/` is listed under its tradition
- File is consumable by `graph_bootstrap.py`

resolution.note: corpus/traditions.toml: 4 traditions (buddhism, gnosticism, hermeticism, jewish_mysticism), 22 texts total. Derived from chunking/ config tree.
